content.en:
Soon, Ye Tian followed the other black fog insects to a place in the primordial sea.

Here, an endless number of black fog insects gather here, and the density is very high.

Moreover, there are more black fog bugs coming.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian saw a black river, almost separated from the Primordial Sea, in another void.

Above this river, there are dense creatures hatching, as if the whole river is a hatching place.

"The hatching place of the Black Mist Worm!"

Ye Tian has always been curious about where the Black Fog Worm was born, because the Black Fog Worm has no need to mate, no gender distinction, and its intelligence is very low.

Under such circumstances, why is the number of black fog insects so terrifying, and each black fog insect is extremely powerful.

This is not normal!

But he spent a long time in the primordial sea, and he didn't find the birthplace of the Black Mist Worm.

Now, he's found it.

No, it should be said that this place of birth appeared on its own.

One by one, the black fog worms hatched out and began to devour the eggshells that hatched them, let's just call it an egg, almost every egg can hatch countless black fog worms.

And at this time, the black fog worms from the outside world also flew in and devoured these eggshells.

Even Ye Tian felt the instinctive desire to devour, as if these eggshells had a great attraction and were of great use to his strength improvement.

"Get out of here!"

Ye Tian used his aura as the king of black fog insects to intimidate the other black fog insects to disperse, and those eggshells had to be devoured by him alone.

Whoa!!!

One by one, the eggshells were devoured and refined by Ye Tian, and the other black fog insects would not resist at all.

As these eggshells were absorbed and refined by him, Ye Tian's aura became more and more powerful.

For the Black Fog Worm, this eggshell is the real treasure resource, and the other resources of the Primordial Sea are not attractive to the Black Fog Worm.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation actually broke through.

This black fog worm clone was actually promoted to the sevenfold realm.

So, Ye Tian continued to devour, as if there was no bottleneck in this body.

The other Black Mist Worms can't do this, their potential is insufficient, they are limited, and even if devouring eggshells can increase their strength, the magnitude is not large.

Perhaps, they instinctively want to break the shackles and break the restrictions, but without the immortal-level ancestral endowment, they can't do it at all.

Soon, the cultivation of the Black Mist Worm clone improved again.

The beginning of the Sevenfold Realm!

Mid-Sevenfold Realm!

Late Stage of the Sevenfold Realm!

The pinnacle of the Sevenfold Realm!

It stands to reason that it should be difficult to break the Sevenfold Realm to the Eightfold Realm, even if Ye Tian's body wants to attack the Eightfold Supreme from the Sevenfold Supreme, it is estimated that it will be more difficult.

However, the Black Mist Worm clone easily broke the shackles and was promoted to the Eightfold Realm, comparable to the Eightfold Supreme.

But the Black Mist Worm is not a supreme being after all, there is no eternal body, and those eternal techniques are not suitable for it.

Therefore, the combat effectiveness of the Black Fog Worm clone is not very strong.

Of course, the Black Mist Worm mainly relies on numbers to win, and it doesn't matter if it is an individual.

After a long time, the cultivation of the Black Mist Worm clone was finally unable to progress any longer, but he had also reached the peak of the Nine Realms.

It's a pity that such a breakthrough is not good for the ontology, and the ontology cannot be borrowed.

After breaking through to the Nine Heavens Realm, Ye Tian's Black Mist Worm clone also became the size of a puppy.

After breaking through in strength, Ye Tian obviously felt that something was wrong with this river.

The normal black fog worm's perception range is not very large, but Ye Tian's perception now covers this river.

In his perception, it was a river similar to an arm, and it was a severed arm, as if it had crossed from the depths of endless time and space, but it had been cut off here.

At this time, he had imagined a picture from a long time ago.

In the Infinite Ancient Era, an incomparably terrifying existence was cut off by another strong man, and this arm was left in the time and space of the Primordial Sea, and then after a special evolution, a black mist worm hatched on this arm.

But this arm is an eternal existence, and even if it gives birth to an endless number of black fog worms, it still does not disappear completely, but turns into the form of a river and continues to exist.

The so-called river form is just a state of decay.

"Is that really the case?"

Ye Tian guessed in his heart.

But if it is true, then how terrifying should the strength of this strong man be?

Even after the Eternal Realm, it was an incomparably terrifying level.

Ye Tian pondered for a while, and then made a decision, that is, to go deep into this river.

I don't know when this river will be hidden, and it will be difficult to find it when the time comes.

But once you enter the depths of the river, it is easy to have problems.

Therefore, Ye Tian found a nearby island and stored the treasures he had collected first.

In this way, even if this black fog worm clone fell, the next time he entered the Primordial Sea, he could take those resources with him without losing them.

After dealing with the resources and treasures, Ye Tian came to this river again, let's call it the Black Mist River for the time being.

Entering the Black Mist River, Ye Tian slammed into it and continued to advance towards the depths of the Black Mist River.

Rumble!!!!

Endless pressure came over him, as if to prevent him from entering the depths of the Black Mist River.

If it were other black fog worms, they wouldn't be able to penetrate at all.

However, Ye Tian's Black Mist Worm clone had already reached the Ninefold Supreme One, so he was able to forcibly break in.

As time passed, Ye Tian went deeper and deeper.

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Tian finally discovered something different.

A rod-shaped weapon with a glowing golden glow appeared in his perception, and there were many more in the distance, something larger like this, and in different shapes.

Ye Tian came to this brilliant golden mang's stick and looked at it carefully.

"It's bones!"

Ye Tian affirmed.

Strictly speaking, it's a fragment of bone, and an insignificant fragment.

At this time, Ye Tian could be sure that his guess was correct.

The Black Mist River was indeed an arm, not only was it cut off, but the bones of the arm were beaten into countless pieces, almost shattered, and turned into countless bone fragments.

And in front of me is a bone fragment of one of them.

Ye Tian tried to attack, and slammed into it with the body of the black mist insect at the peak of his Nine Realms.

With all his strength, the bone fragment actually cracked a little.

"It is estimated that it has existed for too long, and there are black fog insects hatching, constantly absorbing the power of the arm, and the bones of such existence can be knocked out of the cracks by me!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

Of course.

Even so, such a piece of bone is priceless.
